evaluation_result.headline: Strong Full-Stack Developer Match with Minor Gaps
evaluation_result.short_verdict: You are a strong fit for the Full-Stack Developer role, with robust experience across both front-end and back-end technologies. Your CV demonstrates hands-on delivery of production-grade systems, cloud deployment, and modern frameworks. Minor gaps exist in specific security practices and Angular experience, but overall you are well-prepared to apply.

ats_summary.headline: Strong Full-Stack Developer Candidate
ats_summary.short_verdict: Your CV shows excellent alignment with the job requirements, including expertise in JavaScript, Python, React, Node.js, SQL, and cloud platforms. You have proven experience in delivering scalable, secure web applications and collaborating in Agile teams. To further strengthen your application, consider upskilling in Angular and deepening your security practices.
top_strengths: Extensive experience with JavaScript, Python, React, Node.js, and SQL
Production-grade RESTful API and database management
Demonstrated impact in performance optimization and security
top_gaps: No direct evidence of Angular experience
Limited explicit mention of advanced application security practices
Missing explicit demonstration of analytical skills

job_description_analysis.job_summary: The Full-Stack Developer is responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining both front-end and back-end components of web applications. The role requires building scalable systems, optimizing performance, ensuring seamless integration, and collaborating with cross-functional teams. Candidates must have a bachelor’s degree and 2–5 years of relevant experience.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or related field
2–5 years of full-stack or web development experience
Strong knowledge of JavaScript, Python, or Java
Experience with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks like React, Angular, or Vue.js
Experience with back-end frameworks such as Node.js, Django, or Spring
Familiarity with SQL or NoSQL databases
Understanding of RESTful APIs and web services
Knowledge of application security and performance optimization
responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain full-stack web applications
Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code
Develop front-end interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks
Integrate RESTful APIs and third-party services
Debug, test, and optimize application performance
Ensure application scalability, security, and responsiveness

candidate_advice.overall_advice: You are well-positioned for this Full-Stack Developer role. To maximize your chances, highlight any experience with Angular or similar frameworks, and expand on your application security practices. Consider adding more detail about your analytical skills and front-end technologies like HTML and CSS. These minor improvements will make your application even stronger.

priority_improvements.action: Gain or demonstrate experience with Angular or Vue.js.
priority_improvements.reason: The JD specifically requests experience with these frameworks, which are missing from your CV.

priority_improvements.action: Expand on your application security expertise.
priority_improvements.reason: While you mention security practices, the JD expects explicit knowledge of application security.
Analytical skills are a key requirement and should be clearly evidenced.

priority_improvements.action: Add explicit mention of HTML and CSS experience.
priority_improvements.reason: These are core front-end technologies required for the role.

cv_improvements: Add a section or bullet points detailing your experience with HTML and CSS.
Include any relevant projects or tasks involving Angular or Vue.js, if applicable.
Expand on your application security practices, such as secure coding, vulnerability mitigation, or penetration testing.
Provide examples of analytical problem-solving in your project descriptions.
learning_recommendations: Complete a short course or tutorial on Angular or Vue.js.
Review best practices in application security for web development.
Practice analytical skills through coding challenges or system design exercises.
interview_tips: Prepare to discuss your approach to application security and how you ensure secure code.
Be ready to explain your analytical process when solving complex development problems.
If asked about Angular or Vue.js, show willingness to learn and adapt quickly.

strengths: Strong technical foundation in JavaScript, Python, React, Node.js, and SQL
Experience with cloud deployment and production-grade systems
Demonstrated impact in performance optimization and security
Effective collaboration in Agile, distributed teams
gaps: No direct evidence of Angular or Vue.js experience
Limited explicit mention of advanced application security

No explicit mention of HTML and CSS
recommendations: Add or highlight any experience with Angular, Vue.js, HTML, and CSS.
Expand on your application security practices in your CV.
Provide examples of analytical skills in your project descriptions.

retrieval_chunks.title: Job Description Requirements
retrieval_chunks.content: This job description is for the Full-Stack Developer role. The summary is: The Full-Stack Developer is responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining both front-end and back-end components of web applications. The role requires building scalable systems, optimizing performance, ensuring seamless integration, and collaborating with cross-functional teams. Candidates must have a bachelor’s degree and 2–5 years of relevant experience. The main requirements are: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or related field, 2–5 years of full-stack or web development experience, Strong knowledge of JavaScript, Python, or Java, Experience with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks like React, Angular, or Vue.js, Experience with back-end frameworks such as Node.js, Django, or Spring, Familiarity with SQL or NoSQL databases, Understanding of RESTful APIs and web services, Proficiency with version control systems (Git), Knowledge of application security and performance optimization, Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, Good communication and teamwork abilities. The main responsibilities are: Design, develop, and maintain full-stack web applications, Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code, Develop front-end interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks, Build back-end systems using frameworks, Integrate RESTful APIs and third-party services, Manage and optimize databases, Debug, test, and optimize application performance, Ensure application scalability, security, and responsiveness, Work with version control systems, Collaborate with cross-functional teams. The main tools and technologies are: JavaScript, Python, Java, React, Angular, Vue.js, Node.js, Django, Spring, HTML, CSS, SQL, NoSQL, Git.
keywords: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or related field
2–5 years of full-stack or web development experience
Strong knowledge of JavaScript, Python, or Java
Experience with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks like React, Angular, or Vue.js
Experience with back-end frameworks such as Node.js, Django, or Spring
Familiarity with SQL or NoSQL databases
Understanding of RESTful APIs and web services

job_recommendations.reason: You have strong experience in cloud-native deployment, RESTful APIs, and production-grade systems on Microsoft Azure. Your skills in Node.js, Python, and database management are highly relevant for cloud application development.

Your CV demonstrates hands-on experience with AI/NLP pipelines, LLM integration, and cloud deployment. You have used SBERT, spaCy, GLiNER, and RAG in production environments, making you a strong fit for AI engineering roles.
You have extensive backend experience with Node.js, Express.js, REST API design, and multiple databases. Your security and performance optimization skills further support backend development roles.
